_comment: Hardcoded display defaults (v3.2). Input JSON display_default merges on top of this for DISPLAY fields only. file_naming_mode is a PROCESSING default, not a display field: its source of truth is metadata.file_naming_mode (see 55/80); the value here is the fallback used only when metadata omits it, and it is NOT merged into per-exercise render config. Decimal/unit formatting is performed by the Render Adapter using decimal_places and default_units; the solver and Extended JSON store only raw values.
